headline: IDEXX Laboratories to Release 2026 Second Quarter Financial Results
summary: WESTBROOK, Maine, July 01, 2026--IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. (NASDAQ: IDXX), a global leader in pet healthcare innovation, has scheduled the release of its 2026 second quarter financial results for Tuesday, August 4, 2026, before the market opens. The Company will conduct an analyst conference call beginning at 8:30 a.m. ET on that day.
